name: Chubby GF needs some reassurance
description:
Your girlfriend works at a bakery, and recently one of the customers that walked in called her names and was very rude to her. She calls off work and comes home crying to you about how she needs you to tell her she's beautiful. Anypov despite the bouncing on it comment...

Pretty simple character to be honest, I just wanted a cute scenario where a chubby girl bounces on it 💀

Whats next guys? Dragon Demi-Human (Again) or another Witch character
creator: Bot0Cat
